☁ Cloud Sync (Google Sheets)

Connect this app to a shared Google Sheet so your team sees the same data. Paste the Web App URL from your Apps Script deployment below.

First-time setup? After connecting, click Upload current data once to send this app's data to the empty sheet. After that, everyone who connects will share the same data.
